content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be significantly enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-improvement loop that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or labeled data. This hybrid framework outperforms single-perspective Self-Refine by surfacing blind spots the model would miss when only evaluating its own output from its current framing.
